  • Field Details

    • port

      public static int port
      default port is 8080

    • reservedPorts

      public static List<String> reservedPorts
      8000 is a reserved port

    • address

      public static String address

  • Method Details

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      main
      Parameters:
      args - command line arguments - 'sever' to start the server as admin, no arguement starts the client as a user
      Throws:
      Exception - throws an error if the server doesnt start
      IOException - throws an error if the client doesn't start

    • getPort

      public static int getPort(Scanner scanner)
      asks the user for a port number and checks whether its valid, calls itself if its not
      Parameters:
      scanner - scanner to read user input
      Returns:
      returns a valid port number

    • getAddress

      public static String getAddress(Scanner scanner)
      gets an address from the user and checks its a real ip with regex. if given no address it assumes the default 'localhost'
      Parameters:
      scanner - gets user input
      Returns:
      ip address

    • getUser

      public static String getUser(Scanner scanner)
      asks the user for a username
      Parameters:
      scanner - scanner for user input
      Returns:
      returns the username, or annonymous if they user doesn't give one
